title: Section 9
content: On and from the appointed day, in the Fourth Schedule to the Constitution, in the Table,— (a) entries 5 to 21 shall be re-numbered as entries 6 to 22 respectively; (b) after entry 4, the following entry shall be inserted, namely:— “5. Haryana....5”; (c) in entry 12 as so re-numbered, for the figures “11”, the figure “7” shall be substituted; (d) in entry 19 as so re-numbered, for the figure “2”, the figure “3” shall be substituted; and (e) for the figures “226”, the figures “228” shall be substituted.
